dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
What should users be able to do?
search books, borrow them, and return them
Do users need login or authentication?
yeah, students and staff should log in
search should be quick, like 2 seconds
accounts and borrowing history should be protected

functional: The system shall allow students and staff to log in.
The system shall allow users to search for books.
The system shall allow students to borrow books.
The system shall allow students to return books.
non_functional: The system shall return search results within 2 seconds.
The system shall protect user accounts and borrowing history.
